title: NoToolsBreak
description: When enabled it makes sure that you ant break a tool or a weapon.
body:
# 🛠️ NoToolBreak
## ⚡ Never accidentally break your tools again!

NoToolBreak is a simple but powerful Quality-of-Life mod that prevents tools and weapons from breaking accidentally.
When your gear reaches 1 durability, it becomes temporarily unusable until you repair it.
This mod saves your best enchanted equipment, especially your netherite and mending tools!

---

## ✨ Features

- Tool Protection –> prevents breaking blocks with nearly broken tools.
- Weapon Protection –> blocks attacks if a weapon is about to break.
- Hotkey Toggle –> toggle the protection anytime (default: U key).
- Actionbar Warnings –> clear, unobtrusive notifications.
- Lightweight & Compatible –> client-side only, works with any modpack.

---

## 🧭 Controls
Action	Default Key	Description

```
Toggle Tool Protection	U	Enable or disable break protection
```

You can change this keybind in the Controls → Keybinds → No Tool Break section.

---

## 🧰 Compatibility

🧩 Fabric Loader: >= 0.15.0

🧱 Minecraft: 1.21.x

⚙️ Requires Fabric API

---

## 📸 Screenshots

![NoToolsBreak Disabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbe7b28633609e5f4dad99859e77fffaa0c882ee.png)
![NoToolsBreak Enabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60be837563dfda8ed023980bbc3e71331ebe6dbc.png)
![NoToolsBreak preventing a swored from breaking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19e96437ab9214dd9a5f2b2c7e890bc7790c4aed.png)
![NoToolsBreak preventing a pickaxe from breaking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/865f05dfb42996e9a1399b38252b7d1c188ef06e.png)



Your tool won’t break, just repair it first!

---

## 🧠 Technical Details

Client-side only, safe to use on any server.

The protection toggle client-side and doesn’t affect server gameplay.

Fully compatible with any tool, including modded items that use standard durability.

---

## 📜 License

This plugin is free to use on private servers.  
For public distribution, please link back to the official download page.  

---
